spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous spacing. Use p-6, p-8, and p-12 for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.grid_pattern: Bento Grid Protocol. Asymmetrical layouts for marketing pages, dense clear grids for the browse items.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-2xl for main cards, rounded-full for buttons (pill shape for approachability).

surfaces_and_shadows.cards: Flat solid surfaces with 1px border (#E5E0D8), NO muddy shadows. On hover: shadow-md and -translate-y-1.
surfaces_and_shadows.glassmorphism: Used only for sticky header: backdrop-blur-xl bg-[#FAF9F6]/80 border-b border-[#E5E0D8].
surfaces_and_shadows.buttons: Tactile. Primary uses Terracotta (#E05A47) with white text. Secondary uses Forest Green (#2E5E4E). Never use transparent buttons without borders.

components.navigation: Sticky top nav. Logo left, links center, CTA right. Mobile uses hamburger. Glassmorphism effect.
components.hero: Grassroots campaign style. Large asymmetric typography, prominent donation thermometer component next to the hero image.
components.donation_thermometer: Chunky, high contrast. Forest green progress bar, clear monetary milestones. Embed directly in the hero or its own full-width banner.
components.item_cards: Image top (max-h-48, object-cover). Bold typography for expiration date (use Terracotta text if < 2 days). Category pill. Zip code pill. 'Claim' button.
components.forms: Shadcn UI forms, heavily customized. border-stone-300, warm background. Clear labels.
components.modals: Used for the 4-digit claim code. backdrop-blur-sm on the overlay.
components.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='claim-item-button').

animations.hover: Smooth transform translate-y-1 on cards. Button hover darkens color.
animations.loading: Use simple pulsing elements or a custom spinner using lucide-react.

images.description: A group of people sitting around a table with plates of food, 'Welcome friends' written. Perfect for community warmth.
A young man concentrates on studying at his desk. Use in the 'About the Founder' or donation section.
Elderly woman selecting produce at a market. Great context for food items.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly follow the color palette. Background should be #FAF9F6, not pure white.
Install and use 'Outfit' font for headings and 'DM Sans' for body from Google Fonts.
Build the UI in React (.js files) with Tailwind CSS.
Use Shadcn UI for forms, dialogs, dropdowns, but customize the styling to match the organic/tactile vibe (no default SaaS look).
Every button, link, form input, and key element must have a data-testid attribute in kebab-case.
Implement the donation thermometer as a prominent, visual progress bar.
Use lucide-react for icons. Size them appropriately.
For the item grid, use the Bento grid protocol. Do not make equal generic squares.
Ensure 'Expires in...' text has high contrast and visual urgency (e.g., using the primary Terracotta color).
The 4-digit claim code must be a clear, distinct modal with large input fields.
